lock(address,uint256,bytes32,uint256).notice: Lock tokens on BSC pending ION-side credit (via bridge).

release(address,address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Release locked tokens after verified bridge message (idempotent releaseId).

setRelayerDirect(address,bool).notice: Direct relayer setter (no timelock) — for test/deploy convenience only.
